who: sales operations team in a marketing agency processing 10-20 deals/month
offer: For sales operations teams in marketing agencies processing 10-20 deals/month, manual tracking causes delays in compensation reporting. We automate commission calculations instead of using manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: manual tracking of sales commissions leads to errors and delays in compensation reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for sales operations teams
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to sales operations teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try deal tracking dashboard for visibility and compensation report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
